text:
Club "You Rule" クラブ王様 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game.

|align=center colspan="3"|Rank: B 
Transformation: 20

|align=center colspan="3"|Everyone in the club will do your bidding while you are there. However, one hour in the club equals a day outside.
|
|-

|align=center colspan="3"|(unknown)

Summary

Club "You Rule" クラブ王様 - This card allows the caster to effectively control everyone within a club. In other words, everyone in any club walked into by the user will do his/her bidding, providing it is within their capabilities. There is a catch; for every one hour spent in a club while using this card, a whole day passes in the outside world. This card allows the user to potentially get anything they want from other people.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.062 :: クラブ王様 
この店の中にいる間は、店内の誰もがあなたの指令を聞いてくれる。 ただしこの店での１時間は店外の１日を意味する。
|-
![Eng]
|No.062 :: Club "You Rule" 
Whilst in this store, everyone inside will listen and do as you command. However, every hour inside is a day outside.
|}
